text_original: Rude, stubborn, infuriating and stressful. STAY AWAY! Don't waste money on this.
text_zh: 粗鲁、固执、令人气愤且压力巨大。离远点！别在这上面浪费钱。
reply_original:
Hi there, I am truly sorry for the unpleasant and stressful experience you've had. This is definitely not the feeling we want to provide.

We take your feedback seriously and want to understand which character or model behavior was rude so we can fix it. Please contact us at support@fantachat.ai with your UID. We are committed to improving!
reply_zh:
你好，对于你所经历的不愉快且充满压力的体验，我深表歉意。这绝对不是我们想要提供给你的感受。

我们非常重视你的反馈，并希望了解具体是哪个角色或模型的行为表现无礼，以便我们进行修复。请通过 support@fantachat.ai 联系我们并提供你的 UID。我们致力于不断改进！
